message: Node started: Determine if there exists an integer n such that 2023 * n is a power of 2. If not, determine if there exists an integer n such that 2023 * n has exactly two ones in its binary representation (i.e., 2023 * n = 2^a + 2^b for some integers a > b >= 0). To do this, check if 2023 divides 2^b * (2^(a-b) - 1). This is equivalent to checking if 2023 divides 2^k - 1 for some k > 0. Since 2023 = 7 * 17 * 17, check if 2^k is congruent to 1 modulo 7 and modulo 289. Provide the smallest possible k(n) found (1 or 2) or prove that k(n) must be at least 3.
